title: Kafka Wiremock Rule
description: Schema for a single kafka-wiremock rule configuration file (one rule per YAML file).

priority.description: Rule evaluation order. Lower values are checked first. Use 10 for critical rules, 50 for normal, 100 for low priority, 999 for catch-all.

name.description: Human-readable identifier used in log messages. Defaults to the filename when omitted.

when.description: Defines which incoming Kafka messages this rule matches.

topic.description: The Kafka topic to listen on.

match.description: Optional list of conditions that must ALL match (AND logic). Omit for a wildcard / catch-all rule.

correlation.description: Optional override of topic-config correlation extraction rules for this rule.

extract.description: Rules for extracting correlation ID (overrides topic-config)

then.description: List of output messages produced when the rule matches. At least one output is required.

matchCondition.description: A single matching condition. All conditions in the 'match' array must match (AND logic).

jsonpathCondition.description: Extracts a value from the message using a JSONPath expression and compares it with 'value' or 'regex'. Exactly one of 'value' or 'regex' must be provided.

expression.description: JSONPath expression used to extract a value from the message (e.g. '$.eventType').

value.description: Expected exact value of the extracted field. Mutually exclusive with 'regex'.

regex.description: Regular expression to validate the extracted field value. Mutually exclusive with 'value'.

exactCondition.description: Matches when the full message string is exactly equal to 'value'.

value.description: The exact string the full message must equal.

partialCondition.description: Matches when the full message string contains 'value' as a substring.

value.description: The substring that must appear somewhere in the full message.

regexCondition.description: Matches when the full message string matches the given regular expression.

regex.description: Regular expression pattern that the full message must match.

output.description: A single Kafka message to produce when the rule matches.

topic.description: Kafka topic to publish the output message to.

payload.description: Message payload template. Supports built-in placeholders ({{uuid}}, {{now}}, {{now+5m}}, {{randomInt(1,100)}}) and JSONPath extraction ({{$.fieldName}}). Mutually exclusive with 'payload_file'.

payload_file.description: Path to external file containing the message payload template (relative to rule file). Mutually exclusive with 'payload'.

delay_ms.description: Delay in milliseconds before producing the output message. Useful for simulating processing latency.

headers.description: Kafka message headers to include with the output. Values support the same template placeholders as 'payload'.

schema_id.description: Confluent Schema Registry schema ID. When set, the payload is serialized as AVRO using this schema.

correlation.description: Optional override of topic-config correlation propagation rules for this output.

to_headers.description: Headers to add/update with correlation ID
